config.name: akamai_general-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: akamai_general-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Security Control (2001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T10:59:25.850057

-- Pre-compile regex patterns for performance
local patterns = {
    ip = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$",
    timestamp = "^%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%dT%d%d:%d%d:%d%dZ$"
}

-- Cached severity mappings
local severity_map = {
    SQL_Injection = 4,
    Command_Injection = 4, 
    Cross_Site_Scripting = 3,
    Path_Traversal = 3,
    API_Scan = 2
}

-- Cached status mappings
local status_map = {
    blocked = 2,
    denied = 2,
    alert = 1,
    logged = 1
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with required OCSF fields
    local output = {
        class_uid = 2001,
        class_name = "Security Control",
        category_uid = 2, 
        category_name = "Findings",
        activity_id = 1,
        activity_name = "Security Alert",
        type_uid = 200101,
        metadata = {},
        http_request = {},
        http_response = {},
        src_endpoint = {},
        finding = {},
        observables = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp validation and transformation
    if record.timestamp and type(record.timestamp) == "string" and 
       string.match(record.timestamp, patterns.timestamp) then
        output.time = record.timestamp
    else
        output.time = os.date("!%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
    end

    -- Client IP transformation with validation
    if record.client_ip and type(record.client_ip) == "string" and
       string.match(record.client_ip, patterns.ip) then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = record.client_ip
        -- Generate observable
        output.observables[1] = {
            name = "src_ip",
            type = "IP Address", 
            value = record.client_ip
        }
    end

    -- HTTP context mapping
    if record.host then 
        output.http_request.hostname = record.host
    end
    if record.path then
        output.http_request.url = {path = record.path}
    end
    if record.http_method then
        output.http_request.http_method = record.http_method
    end
    if record.user_agent then
        output.http_request.user_agent = record.user_agent
    end
    if record.status_code then
        output.http_response.code = tonumber(record.status_code)
    end

    -- Attack classification
    if record.attack_type then
        output.finding.type = record.attack_type
        output.severity_id = severity_map[record.attack_type] or 2
    end

    -- Rule and disposition
    if record.rule_id then
        output.metadata.rule_uid = record.rule_id
    end
    if record.action then
        output.disposition = record.action
        output.status_id = status_map[record.action] or 1
    end
    if record.message then
        output.message = record.message
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid OCSF classification"
    end

    return output
end
